article_title: Burnaby Council — 9.2. Amenity Pier Covenant  Developer Election to Forfeit Security 2026-04-14.pdf

briefs.title: Council to Consider: Developer Forfeits $1.36M Instead of Building Public Pier
briefs.summary: Council is set to receive information about Oxford Properties' decision to forfeit $1,363,500 in security — money held as a guarantee — rather than build a planned public pier on the Fraser River at Riverbend Business Park. The City will hold these funds and decide later how to spend them on a public amenity.
briefs.action_required: Watch for how Council directs the $1.36M in forfeited funds — it may fund a public amenity near your business.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council meeting — Amenity Pier Covenant report received for information
